nasb.text: They will not remain in the Lord’s land, But Ephraim will return to Egypt, And in Assyria they will eat unclean food.

esv.text: They shall not remain in the land of the Lord, but Ephraim shall return to Egypt, and they shall eat unclean food in Assyria.

cnv.text: 他們必不得住在耶和華之地； 以法蓮要回到埃及去， 要在亞述吃不潔之物。

ccb.text: 你们将不能再住在耶和华的土地上。 以法莲要返回埃及， 在亚述吃不洁之物。
